nasb.text: All the people crossed over the Jordan and the king crossed too. The king then kissed Barzillai and blessed him, and he returned to his place.

esv.text: Then all the people went over the Jordan, and the king went over. And the king kissed Barzillai and blessed him, and he returned to his own home.

cnv.text: 於是眾人都渡過約旦河，王也渡過了。王與巴西萊親吻，為他祝福，巴西萊就回自己的地方去了。

ccb.text: 王和众人过了约旦河以后，就亲吻巴西莱，为他祝福。巴西莱返回了家乡。
